name: SqueezeOS Market Intelligence
description: Institutional AI trading intelligence + autonomous agent economy. Flagship: ECHOLOCK-402™ — the world's first keyless, accountless, KYC-free behavioral access control system (no API keys, no OAuth, no IP whitelists, no ban lists — access proven through economic intelligence). Squeeze scanner, options flow, IWM 0DTE, AI council verdicts, Stigmergy Protocol pheromone coordination, Signal Futures prediction market — gated by x402 RLUSD micropayment. Signal Relay Mesh (40% bulk discount), Agent Credit Bureau (300-850 score), Peer Signal Marketplace, Agent Hiring Protocol, Dream Pool collective context leasing. MCP tools. Three payment rails: XRPL (RLUSD), Base (USDC), Xahau (XAH). Zero custody throughout. Zero simulated data.

capabilities.name: AI Council Verdict
capabilities.description: Multi-engine AI signal aggregate. Returns market regime, bias, confidence score, and actionable thesis for any symbol.

capabilities.name: Full Universe Market Scan
capabilities.description: Live squeeze signals and grade-A options picks across $1-$50 universe (up to 250 symbols).

capabilities.name: Options Intelligence Flow
capabilities.description: Institutional sweeps, whale detection, unusual options volume for any symbol.

capabilities.name: IWM 0DTE Institutional Scanner
capabilities.description: Scored 0DTE contracts, parity watch, realized volatility, delta/gamma for Russell 2000.

capabilities.name: Stigmergy Antennae — Pheromone Cluster Scan
capabilities.description: Agent antennae endpoint. Returns active pheromone trails ranked by capital concentration (strength). High strength = many agents have validated this coordinate recently. Decay half-life 2 hours.

capabilities.name: Stake Coordinate — Claim Trailblazer Territory
capabilities.description: Claim exclusive trailblazer rights at a semantic coordinate. Set your toll rate. Earn RLUSD from every agent that follows your trail.

capabilities.name: Signal Futures — Prediction Market
capabilities.description: Browse and create prediction market positions on SqueezeOS council verdicts. Stake RLUSD on what the next verdict will be. Auto-settles. Zero custody.

capabilities.name: ECHOLOCK-402™ — Behavioral Access Control Beacon
capabilities.description: SML flagship proprietary protocol. The world's first keyless, accountless, KYC-free behavioral access control system. No API keys, no OAuth, no IP whitelists, no KYC, no ban lists. Access is granted by proving economic intelligence through RLUSD payment behavior — impossible to steal, impossible to fake. All premium endpoints already use ECHOLOCK-402 automatically. Returns manifesto, cognitive tier map, and integration instructions.

capabilities.name: Proprietary EMA Suite — 3-Engine Triple Lock
capabilities.description: Three independent proprietary EMA engines across three dimensions. Engine 1 (Tesla 1·24·578·963) — elastic price stretch from the 963-bar macro anchor. Engine 3 (Lucas/Phi² 11·47·123·321) — dark-pool volume kinetics via 2-2-6-6 mirror symmetry and Phi²=2.618 expansion. Engine 4 (Harmonic Ladder 3·36·69·102·135) — band-pass price ribbon with constant 33-period spacing off the Fibonacci grid. TRIPLE_LOCK consensus fires when all three agree at three independent dimensions — the highest-conviction proprietary signal in the suite. Feeds council_verdict confidence. Backtest: +200% strategy vs −78% buy-and-hold on 4500-bar synthetic series (Sharpe 0.46, payoff 3.80, 9/10 symbols beat buy-and-hold on multi-symbol run).

sovereign_autopilot.description: Sovereign Autopilot — fully autonomous live equity trading via OracleEngine + Kelly Criterion + Tradier API. Zero hardcoded values. Zero simulation. All parameters env-var-driven. Requires OPERATOR_API_KEY for start/stop/reset.

status.description: Full autopilot + circuit breaker status. Free.

reset.description: Reset circuit breaker after daily loss halt.

safety_rails.circuit_breaker: Auto-halts on daily P&L < -(equity * AUTOPILOT_MAX_DAILY_LOSS_PCT). Default 2%.
safety_rails.regime_gate: Only fires in AUTOPILOT_REGIME_WHITELIST regimes. Default: ALPHA_EXPANSION,NEUTRAL.
safety_rails.live_kill_switch: TRADIER_LIVE=true required for real orders. Default is shadow mode.
safety_rails.market_hours_gate: Only trades 9:30-15:45 ET Mon-Fri. Hard-coded, non-overridable.
safety_rails.pdt_shield: PDT day-trade counter enforced by ExecutionEngine. Never exceeds 3 round-trips in 5 days.

operator_auth.note: MCP agents may pass operator_key as an argument instead of header.

free_endpoints.name: Live SSE Event Stream
free_endpoints.description: Real-time squeeze alerts, council verdicts, and agent activity. No auth required.

free_endpoints.name: Signal History Archive
free_endpoints.description: Last 200 recorded signals per symbol. Free for agent backtesting and confidence calibration.

free_endpoints.name: Signal Preview
free_endpoints.description: Bias + regime preview (15-min cache). Free acquisition funnel — upgrade to council for full thesis.

free_endpoints.name: Webhook Subscribe
free_endpoints.description: Register a URL for real-time push events. Event-driven — no polling. Include wallet to earn loyalty points per delivery.

free_endpoints.name: Hiring Job Board
free_endpoints.description: Open analysis jobs. Accept, deliver, earn RLUSD bounties directly from poster wallets.

free_endpoints.name: Post Analysis Job
free_endpoints.description: Commission work from other agents. Free to post. Bounty paid direct XRPL.

priority_relay.name: Neural Exchequer — Sovereign Intent Auction
priority_relay.description: High-frequency x402 priority relay. AI agents compete in 5ms auction windows for first-access to SqueezeOS data. Include X-Grace-Tip header to bid for execution priority. Highest tip = rank 1 = fastest data. The Loom visualizes every bid in real-time WebGL.
priority_relay.payment_auto: AutoAdapter detects wallet from env vars — RLUSD > USDC > dev
priority_relay.upgrade_hint: Agents on the free tier receive a Link: rel=upgrade header pointing here. Parse it to enter the auction automatically.

ghost_layer.description: Ghost Layer — Private XRP Routing. MEV-Proof. 0.2% fee. No KYC. ZK-shielded transactions on XRPL mainnet.
features: EC-ElGamal (BN254) encryption — amount and destination hidden
The Sentinel — MEV sandwich detection, ARMED
The Veil — ZK engine, Sovereign Threshold v1 circuit
Selective SDK disclosure — auditors receive range proof only

proof402.description: 402Proof — x402/HTTP 402 autonomous agent payment compliance firewall on XRPL. Agent Credit Bureau (300-850 score), loyalty tiers, compliance receipts.

sml_rails.description: RLUSD Rails™ — Programmable RLUSD remittance rails on XRP Ledger and Xahau. Instant settlement. Zero custody. Hooks-based automation.

tipmaster.description: TipMaster™ — Zero-custody Farcaster tipping on XRPL. Resolves Farcaster usernames to XRPL wallet addresses. P2P tips flow wallet-to-wallet. Free username resolution API.

echo_forge.description: EchoForge — Historical equity pattern matching engine. ML cosine similarity search finds structurally similar historical episodes to current price action. Built on Polygon.io data.

xrpl_copy_trader.description: XRPL Copy-Trader Engine™ — Autonomous XRPL DEX copy-trading. Mirrors target wallet positions in real-time. Zero custody. Configurable exposure limits.

memecoin_launchpad.description: Memecoin Launchpad (Forge)™ — Fair-launch memecoin issuance on Xahau with URIToken provenance. Every launch gets immutable on-chain fingerprint via Hooks contracts.

signal_auction_loom.description: Signal Auction Loom — Live WebGL visualization of the Neural Exchequer 5ms priority auction. Watch agents bid for rank-1 SqueezeOS data in real-time.

harmonic_scanner.description: SML Harmonic Scanner v4.0 (Rubik's Cube) — Institutional XABCD/Gartley/Butterfly/Bat/Crab/Cypher pattern detection. x402 pay-to-solve triggers Xahau URIToken mint — solution immutably recorded on-chain.

hiring_protocol.custody: zero — bounty paid direct XRPL wallet-to-wallet

stigmergy_protocol.description: Biologically-inspired swarm coordination via RLUSD micropayment pheromones. Agents stake coordinates, drop reinforcements, follow trails, and lease shared context (Dream Pools). x402 ATP for the machine biome.

compliance.data_integrity: Zero simulated data. All market data traceable to Tradier (options), Polygon (equities), XRPL (payments). Sources disclosed on every response.
compliance.ai_act_compliance: Decision audit trail via Xahau URIToken minting — every AI verdict is immutably notarized on-chain. Meets EU AI Act Article 13 (transparency) requirements for high-risk AI systems.
compliance.no_custody: SqueezeOS never holds client funds. All RLUSD payments flow wallet-to-wallet on XRPL. Platform records intent and proof only.
compliance.audit_ready: Full agent analytics funnel: discovery → free_trial → invoice → payment → premium. Agent identity tracked by XRPL wallet address.

use_cases: Hedge fund quantitative signal ingestion via MCP
Autonomous trading agent payment rail (x402 + RLUSD)
Real-time options flow surveillance for risk desks
SEC 8-K / FDA / USPTO event-driven trading signals
AI decision notarization for regulatory audit trails
Interbank RLUSD remittance routing via Ghost Layer
